# Subtitle text style record

**Data field**

One or more records that provide details about the subtitle’s style.

## Overview

One record consists of the following fields.



## Data fields

- **Size**: An unsigned 32-bit integer holding the size of the subtitle style atom.
- **Type**: An unsigned 32-bit field.
- **Entry count**: An unsigned 16-bit integer specifying how many subtitle text style records follow this entry count.
